summary: Creates initial schema: channels, messages, summaries (daily), and sync_state tables with indexes

observations.text: Creates a migrations table inside the migration itself (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS migrations). This is redundant with migrations.go's createMigrationsTable, but harmless — IF NOT EXISTS makes it a no-op on subsequent runs.

Original sync_state used INTEGER last_msg_id; migration 002 replaces this with TEXT checkpoint. The summaries (daily) table created here is dropped by migration 004 and replaced with per-message summaries.
telegram_id on channels is UNIQUE NOT NULL in this initial schema — migration 003 loosens this to nullable with a partial unique index to support non-Telegram sources.
